title: Relatório Diário com Breakdown por Sessão e Stats de Jogo
plan: Add repository methods to query hands and actions by session (get_hands_for_session, get_actions_for_session) using date/time matching between hands and sessions
Implement session-level stats calculation in cash analyzer (VPIP%, PFR%, 3-Bet%, AF, WTSD%, W$SD%, CBet%) reusing existing stat calculation logic
Build sparkline data generator for session stack evolution (cumulative profit per hand within session)
Implement session hand extremes finder (biggest win/loss per session instead of per day)
Calculate weighted average day stats from session stats (weighted by hands count)
Enhance daily report HTML to render accordion/collapsible session cards with session info (start/end time, duration, buy-in, cash-out, profit, hands, min stack)
Add inline SVG sparkline rendering for session profit evolution
Add stats badges with health indicator colors (green/yellow/red) inside each session card
Move notable hands display from day level into corresponding session cards
Add CSS for accordion behavior, session card layout, and responsive grid (desktop 3-4 cols, mobile 2 cols)
Write comprehensive tests for session stats calculation and sparkline data generation
Run quality gates (tests, lint, typecheck, build)
